hero.headline: *Fast, Reliable* Plumbing Solutions for Salt Lake City Homes
hero.subheadline: From emergency repairs to complete installations, our experienced team delivers quality workmanship that keeps your home's plumbing running smoothly.

services_section.label: OUR SERVICES
services_section.heading: Complete Plumbing Solutions
services_section.subheading: Professional residential plumbing services you can count on

services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repair
services.description: 24/7 response for burst pipes, clogged drains, water heater failures, and other urgent plumbing issues that can't wait until morning.

services.title: Pipe Installation & Replacement
services.description: Complete repiping services using modern materials. We handle everything from single pipe repairs to whole-house plumbing upgrades.

services.title: Water Heater Services
services.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance of traditional and tankless water heaters. Get hot water flowing again with expert service.

services.title: Drain Cleaning & Repair
services.description: Professional drain cleaning and repair services to eliminate clogs, slow drains, and recurring blockages throughout your home.

services.title: Bathroom & Kitchen Plumbing
services.description: Complete plumbing installation for remodels, fixture upgrades, and new construction. Quality work that meets code requirements.

about.heading: Your Local Salt Lake City Plumbing Experts
about.body: For over 8 years, BK Plumbing has been the trusted choice for homeowners throughout the Salt Lake Valley. Our experienced team combines old-school craftsmanship with modern techniques to deliver plumbing solutions that last. We take pride in our reputation for honest pricing, reliable service, and treating every home like our own.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Had a water heater emergency on a Sunday morning and BK Plumbing was at my house within 2 hours. New unit installed by afternoon and everything works perfectly. Really saved our weekend!

reviews.name: Mike R.
reviews.text: Needed our master bathroom completely replumbed during a remodel. The team was professional, stayed on schedule, and the work passed inspection on the first try. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Called about a persistent kitchen drain issue that two other plumbers couldn't fix. BK figured out the problem in 20 minutes and had it running like new. Fair pricing too.

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREAS
service_areas.heading: Serving the Greater Salt Lake Valley
service_areas.subheading: Professional plumbing services throughout Salt Lake County

cta.heading: Ready to Fix Your Plumbing Issues?
cta.body: Don't let plumbing problems disrupt your day. Contact BK Plumbing for fast, professional service from Salt Lake City's trusted plumbing experts.
